sales.description:
Ancients
Justin I (AD 518-527). AV tremissis (17mm, 1.50 gm, 6h). NGC AU 4/5 - 3/5, marks. Constantinople. D N IVSTI-NVS PP AVG, pearl-diademed, draped, and cuirassed bust of Justin I right, seen from front / VICTORIA AVGVSTORVM, Victory advancing facing, head left, wreath in outstretched right hand, globus cruciger in left; star in right field, CONOB in exergue. Sear 58. The holder notes that this coin is possibly an issue of Justin II.  www.HA.com/TexasAuctioneerLicenseNotice
